creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
Upgrade cervisia from 0.3.1 to 0.5.0.
Changes to port;
	1) Removed obsolete patch-aa
	2) Changed it so it now installs in /usr/local like
	   other KDE apps. Having it in X11BASE only complicates
	   the deinstall..
	3) Cleaned up the Makefile a tad bit.
	4) Update to PLIST.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the patch below to fix the current port.
